refs.description: Clean reference DP implementation of LCS with table construction and subsequence backtracking.
Well-documented JavaScript LCS implementation building the DP matrix and reconstructing the subsequence.
Git's diff engine uses the Myers O(ND) longest-common-subsequence / shortest-edit-script algorithm to compute file diffs.
Python's difflib SequenceMatcher finds longest matching/common subsequences to produce human-readable diffs.
